deep.title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
deep.one_line: 遮蔽过时观察对搜索agent的帮助呈倒U型，应谨慎使用。

deep.title: Humanoid-GPT: Scaling Data and Structure for Zero-Shot Motion Tracking
deep.one_line: GPT风格预训练实现人形机器人零样本运动跟踪，展示大规模数据与模型扩展的方法。

deep.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
deep.one_line: 搜索agent通过状态外化减轻策略的例程负担，用RL训练20B模型。

radar.title: LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards
radar.one_line: 利用搜索agent轨迹和多跳问题生成长上下文推理数据，用rubric rewards训练。

radar.title: Reproducing, Analyzing, and Detecting Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
radar.one_line: 通过可控环境重现和分析rubric-based强化学习中的奖励黑客行为，提供了检测与缓解方法。

radar.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
radar.one_line: 搜索agent直接执行shell命令检索语料库

radar.title: K-BrowseComp: A Web Browsing Agent Benchmark Grounded in Korean Contexts
radar.one_line: 它教了构建特定语言上下文web agent基准的方法和评测思路

radar.title: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
radar.one_line: 提出评估角色扮演语言代理角色心理轨迹的基准，可迁移至叙事性代理评估。

radar.title: Representation Forcing for Bottleneck-Free Unified Multimodal Models
radar.one_line: 通过表示强制技术去除统一多模态模型的VAE瓶颈。

radar.title: SkillAdaptor: Self-Adapting Skills for LLM Agents from Trajectories
radar.one_line: 提出训练自由的step-level技能适应框架，通过显式失败归因提升LLM agent性能

radar.title: dMoE: dLLMs with Learnable Block Experts
radar.one_line: 提出可学习块专家的dMoE架构，解决扩散LLM中并行解码与MoE路由的不匹配问题。

radar.title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
radar.one_line: PEFT缩放规律，共享模型加小适配器实现个性化

radar.title: Mellum2 Technical Report
radar.one_line: 它教了针对软件工程的MoE模型架构设计和训练范式
